purpose: Per-vendor bias correction matrix for G45 multi-vote aggregator. Applied delta_correction to raw vote score prior consensus computation. Source: plan doc §6.3 Atom 3.3 + frammenti chat M-AI-NEW-12.

anthropic_claude.rationale: Same model paradigm reviewing own output = systematic inflate

moonshot_kimi.rationale: Open weights training distinct - reliable independent

deepseek_r1.rationale: R1 reasoning depth catches subtle gaps

calibration_history.note: Bias correction reduced spread 0.5→0.2 (60% reduction), neutralized claude+0.5 vs codex-0.5 vendor systematic. Consensus 8.27 vs Claude self-cap 8.40-8.50 = self-cap inflato +0.13-0.23. ONESTO.
